2604.10116.title: A Dual Cross-Attention Graph Learning Framework For Multimodal MRI-Based Major Depressive Disorder Detection
2604.10116.paper_summary: Major depressive disorder (MDD) is a prevalent mental disorder associated with complex neurobiological changes that cannot be fully captured using a single imaging modality. The use of multimodal magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides a more comprehensive understanding of brain changes by combining structural and functional data. Despite this, the effective integration of these modalities remains challenging. In this study, we propose a dual cross-attention-based multimodal fusion framework that explicitly models bidirectional interactions between structural MRI (sMRI) and resting-state functional MRI (rs-fMRI) representations. The proposed approach is tested on the large-scale REST-meta-MDD dataset using both structural and functional brain atlas configurations. Numerous experiments conducted under a 10-fold stratified cross-validation demonstrated that the proposed fusion algorithm achieves robust and competitive performance across all atlas types. The proposed method consistently outperforms conventional feature-level concatenation for functional atlases, while maintaining comparable performance for structural atlases. The most effective dual cross-attention multimodal model obtained 84.71% accuracy, 86.42% sensitivity, 82.89% specificity, 84.34% precision, and 85.37% F1-score. These findings emphasize the importance of explicitly modeling cross-modal interactions for multimodal neuroimaging-based MDD classification.
2604.10116.paper_summary_zh: 重度憂鬱症（MDD）是一種普遍的心理疾病，與複雜的神經生物學變化相關，這些變化無法僅通過單一成像模式完全捕捉。使用多模態磁共振成像（MRI）通過結合結構性和功能性數據提供了對大腦變化的更全面理解。儘管如此，這些模態的有效整合仍然具有挑戰性。在本研究中，我們提出了一種基於雙重交叉注意力的多模態融合框架，明確建模結構性MRI（sMRI）和靜息態功能性MRI（rs-fMRI）表示之間的雙向互動。所提出的方法在大型REST-meta-MDD數據集上進行測試，使用結構性和功能性大腦圖譜配置。在10折分層交叉驗證下進行的多項實驗表明，所提出的融合算法在所有圖譜類型中都達到了穩健且具有競爭力的性能。所提出的方法在功能性圖譜上始終優於傳統的特徵級串聯，同時在結構性圖譜上保持可比的性能。最有效的雙重交叉注意力多模態模型達到了84.71%的準確率、86.42%的敏感性、82.89%的特異性、84.34%的精確率和85.37%的F1分數。這些發現強調了明確建模跨模態互動在基於多模態神經成像的MDD分類中的重要性。
2604.10116.author: Nojod M. Alotaibi et.al.
2604.10116.authors: Nojod M. Alotaibi, Areej M. Alhothali
